name: LOCKHEED MARTIN CORP
summary: Lockheed Martin is a global aerospace and defense technology company operating in four segments: Aeronautics, Missiles and Fire Control (MFC), Rotary and Mission Systems (RMS), and Space. Key products include the F-35 Lightning II fighter (27% of total sales), C-130 Hercules, F-16, F-22, PAC-3, THAAD, HIMARS, Javelin, Black Hawk helicopters, Aegis Combat System, Trident II D5 missile, and GPS III satellites. Primary customers are U.S. Government agencies and allied nations.

products.name: F-35 Lightning II
products.description: International multi-role, multi-variant, fifth generation stealth fighter generating 27% of total consolidated sales.

products.name: C-130 Hercules
products.description: International tactical airlifter produced for U.S. and foreign military customers.

products.name: F-16 Fighting Falcon
products.description: Combat-proven international multi-role fighter aircraft.

products.name: F-22 Raptor
products.description: Air dominance and multi-role fifth generation stealth fighter.

products.name: PAC-3 (Patriot Advanced Capability-3)
products.description: Advanced defensive missile using kinetic energy to intercept airborne threats for U.S. Army and international customers.

products.name: THAAD (Terminal High Altitude Area Defense)
products.description: Transportable defensive missile system engaging targets within and outside Earth's atmosphere.

products.name: HIMARS / MLRS
products.description: Highly mobile surface-to-surface rocket and missile system for U.S. Army and international customers.

products.name: Precision Strike Missile (PrSM)
products.description: Next generation precision strike surface-to-surface weapon compatible with MLRS launchers for U.S. Army.

products.name: JASSM (Joint Air-to-Surface Standoff Missile)
products.description: Air-to-ground missile launched from fixed-wing aircraft for U.S. Air Force and international customers.

products.name: LRASM (Long Range Anti-Ship Missile)
products.description: Precision guided anti-ship missile derived from JASSM for U.S. Air Force, Navy, and international customers.

products.name: Hellfire / JAGM
products.description: Air-to-ground missiles used on rotary and fixed-wing aircraft for U.S. Army, Navy, Marine Corps, and international customers.

products.name: Javelin
products.description: Portable anti-tank and multi-target precision weapon system produced via joint venture with RTX Corporation.

products.name: SNIPER Advanced Targeting Pod
products.description: Targeting system for fixed-wing aircraft produced for U.S. Air Force and international customers.

products.name: IRST21
products.description: Long-range infrared detection and tracking sensor for airborne threats on fixed-wing aircraft.

products.name: Black Hawk / Seahawk Helicopters
products.description: Military helicopters in service with U.S. and foreign governments under Sikorsky programs.

products.name: CH-53K King Stallion
products.description: Heavy lift helicopter in service with U.S. and foreign governments.

products.name: Aegis Combat System
products.description: Air and missile defense system for U.S. Navy and international customers; sea and land-based missile defense element.

products.name: Littoral Combat Ship (LCS)
products.description: Surface combatant ship designed for shallow waters and open ocean for the U.S. Navy.

products.name: C2BMC (Command, Control, Battle Management and Communications)
products.description: Air operations center for the Ballistic Missile Defense System for the U.S. Government.

products.name: Trident II D5 Fleet Ballistic Missile
products.description: Only submarine-launched intercontinental ballistic missile currently in production in the U.S., for the U.S. Navy.

products.name: Next Gen OPIR
products.description: Enhanced worldwide missile warning satellite system for the U.S. Space Force.

products.name: Next Generation Interceptor (NGI)
products.description: Homeland missile defense system using next generation propulsion and sensors for the Missile Defense Agency.

products.name: Orion Multi-Purpose Crew Vehicle
products.description: NASA's next generation exploration-class crewed vehicle for human lunar and deep space exploration.

products.name: GPS III
products.description: Modernized GPS satellite system produced for the U.S. Space Force.

products.name: Transport and Tracking Layer
products.description: Small satellite constellations for missile warning and communications for the Space Development Agency.

products.name: SOF GLSS (Special Operations Forces Global Logistics Support Services)
products.description: Logistics support services for U.S. military special operations forces.

products.name: Apache Fire Control System
products.description: Weapons-targeting system for the Apache helicopter for U.S. Army and international customers.

products.name: Combat Rescue Helicopter (CRH)
products.description: Helicopter utilized by the U.S. Air Force under Sikorsky programs.

products.name: Hypersonics Programs
products.description: Multiple programs with U.S. Air Force, Army, and Navy to design, develop, and build hypersonic strike weapons.

partnerships.description: Joint venture to develop and produce the Javelin anti-tank missile system for U.S. Army and Marine Corps.
Producing the Orion Multi-Purpose Crew Vehicle for human lunar and deep space exploration.
Developing Transport and Tracking Layer small satellite constellations for missile warning and communications.
